Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2025 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The City and County of San Francisco (City)'s unopposed demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. The first amended complaint, filed on July 26, 2024, does not comply with CCP 425.10(a)(1), requiring a statement of the facts that would constitute a cause of action. Indeed, the complaint discloses no ultimate facts that would support relief on any theory. Plaintiff has not opposed the demurrer and has offered no facts he could plead to support relief.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. The court orders plaintiff immediately to meet and confer in compliance with CCP 430.41. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by February 18, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
